title: Touch up some troubleshooting nits
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Touch up a couple nits in the troubleshooting guide.  We were missing a line separator and had two number "4" points.

comments.body: @TomSweeneyRedHat Actually, since we solved the current number 4 upstream (we don't need a workaround anymore), you can probably delete it. Or replace it with a recommendation to update to a 0.12.x release?

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@TomSweeneyRedHat Are you going to remove the troubleshooting issue that has been fixed?
@rhatdan, next up on my list.  I'm not going to remove yet as it's not in the released product.  I will add a note that it's fixed upstream though.
